data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of explicit separation from non-enrolled business flows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for explicit separation from non-enrolled business flows. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or records that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to this requirement leads to an inconclusive result, as there is no data to assert whether the requirement is met or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence of explicit separation from non-enrolled business flows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement of separation from non-enrolled business flows.
